— Total revolving balance on all external credit lines (USD).
— Average utilization across all external credit lines.

— Tenure of the customer in months as recorded by LexisNexis.
— Homeownership indicator (1 = customer owns home, 0 = does not).

— Merchant Risk Score. Values above 2 are risky.

— Internal Delinquency Index. Values above 5.8 are considered risky.
— Out of Pattern Spend index wrt to Exposure. Values above 28 are risky.

— RNN risk score for spend patterns. Values above 0.017 are considered risky.
